titleStmt.title: SII 28.224: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 224. (A.R. No. 379 of 1913.) Eṟumbūr, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kadambavanēśvara temple, central shrine, south base.

Records the gift of 90 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of God Chiṟu-ttirukkōyil-pperumāṉaḍigaḷ in Uṟumār, a dēvadānam in Veḍakarai-Nalvayalūr-kkūṟṟam by Kali-nīkki Guṇavaṉ of Maruṅgil in Kōṉāḍu. The donor also gave a dharā-nilai-viḷakku weighing 75 palam for the purpose. The sabhā of Uṟumūr undertook to maintain the lamp supplying one uḻakku of ghee daily that will be yielded by the sheep.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . maturai koṇṭa kopparakesaripanmarkku yāṇṭu patiṉeṭṭāvatu vaṭakarai nalvayalūrk kūṟṟattut tevatāṉa muṟumurc ci
ṟut tirukkoyilp perumāṉaṭikaḷukku koṉāṭṭu maruṅkilk kalinikki kuṇavaṉaṭṭiṉa Āṭu toṇṇūṟumavaṉe kuṭutta tarānilai vi
ḷakku niṟai Eḻupattaimpalam Ittoṇṇūṟāṭuñ cāvā muvāpperāṭāka nicata muḻakku neyyālivaṉ kuṭutta nilai viḷakkile A
ṭṭi candrādittavaṟ nicatamoru nantā viḷakkerip pippomāṉom Uṟumur sabhaiyomitu panmāheśvarari rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 28.224 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
